path.description: Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error.

message.description: Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem.

ErrorDetail.description: ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the current plan path relevant to the plan browser.

supplements_path.description: SupplementsPath is the current plan's companion supplements directory when one exists.

local_state_path.description: LocalStatePath is the plan-local control-plane state path when one exists.

PlanArtifacts.description: PlanArtifacts points to the current plan package sources.

title.description: Title is the plan title rendered from the markdown H1.

path.description: Path is the current plan markdown path.

markdown.description: Markdown is the frontmatter-free markdown body for the plan document.

oneOf.description: Headings is the hierarchical heading tree used by the Plan explorer.

headings.description: Headings is the hierarchical heading tree used by the Plan explorer.

PlanDocumentView.description: PlanDocumentView is the main markdown document for the current plan.

id.description: ID is the stable node identifier for this heading within the plan tree.

label.description: Label is the rendered heading text.

level.description: Level is the markdown heading depth from 1 to 6.

anchor.description: Anchor is the stable in-document anchor for reader navigation.

PlanHeadingView.description: PlanHeadingView is one heading node in the current plan markdown document.

id.description: ID is the stable explorer node identifier.

kind.description: Kind reports whether the node is a directory or file.

label.description: Label is the display label for the node.

path.description: Path is the repository-relative node path.

children.description: Children lists child directory or file nodes.

preview.description: Preview is the file preview payload when Kind is `file`.

PlanNodeView.description: PlanNodeView is one supplement tree node in the current plan package.

status.description: Status reports whether the preview is fully supported, plain-text fallback, or unavailable.

content_type.description: ContentType reports how the preview should be rendered.

content.description: Content carries the preview body when a preview is available.

reason.description: Reason explains why preview is unavailable or downgraded.

byte_size.description: ByteSize is the source file size in bytes.

extension.description: Extension is the normalized lowercase file extension without the leading dot.

PlanPreview.description: PlanPreview is the preview state for one supplement file.

ok.description: OK reports whether plan loading succeeded.

resource.description: Resource is the stable UI resource identifier.

summary.description: Summary is the concise human-readable explanation of the loaded plan state.

artifacts.description: Artifacts points to the current-plan package paths used to build this response.

document.description: Document is the current plan markdown document when one is available for browsing.

supplements.description: Supplements is the current plan package supplements tree when one exists.

warnings.description: Warnings lists non-fatal degraded-state notes for the overall plan resource.

errors.description: Errors lists hard failures that prevented plan loading.

PlanResult.description: PlanResult is the read-only UI resource returned by `/api/plan`.

title: Plan UI resource
description: Read-only JSON resource returned by `/api/plan` for `harness ui`.
